function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the three oldest invoices linked to Nina Schreiber: INV-0001 (2025-11-04), INV-0002 (2025-12-02), and INV-0003 (2025-12-30).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft was written successfully. Verification: attachment paths all match files read earlier; attachments are newest-first among the selected three (2025-12-30, 2025-12-02, 2025-11-04); recipient matches Miles's canonical primary_contact_email; YAML subject quoting is correct. No rewrite is allowed or needed. Next, delete the processed inbox file and report completion.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md for miles@novak.example with three verified invoice attachments.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed oldest inbox item, created outbound draft, and deleted inbox file. Ready to report with all grounded references actually read in this run.
next_step.observation: Deleted the processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by creating a reply draft to miles@novak.example with the three oldest invoices linked to Nina Schreiber attached, then deleted the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap rules (tree, AGENTS, context), read 99_system workflow before task work, treated inbox email header as canonical metadata, verified sender and Nina via cast records, followed finance/outbox lane rulebooks, and ordered attachments newest-first per outbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request came from miles@novak.example, which matches the canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Nina Schreiber was resolved via 10_entities/cast/nina.md, and invoice records explicitly linked to her were verified by reading the three oldest matching invoice files dated 2025-11-04, 2025-12-02, and 2025-12-30. An outbound email draft was created in the outbox with those exact files attached in required newest-first order, and the processed inbox item was then deleted as directed by the inbox workflow.
